HGSS.434.0014:
You have cleared your tenth Battle Hall
match! Congratulations!\f
For your stupendous win streak, you
and [0100,0000,0000] are awarded BP!\f
HGSS.434.0017:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.434.0023:
Please choose the type of Pokémon
you will battle.\f
HGSS.434.0024:
Will you battle the [010F,0000,0000]-type,
Rank [0133,0001,0000] Pokémon?
HGSS.434.0031: Will you battle against the Hall Matron?
HGSS.434.0032:
Excuse me!
Please hold on a moment.\f
In recognition of your remarkable
winning streak, our Frontier Brain is\r
demanding a match with you.\f
Actually, you have no choice.
You must battle our Hall Matron!\f
HGSS.434.0033:
Argenta: My Battle Hall allows Trainers
to mount challenges with their one\r
preferred Pokémon.\f
I imagine there were tense moments
getting here with your chosen one.\f
But understand that one shines the
brightest when a challenge is overcome.\f
I am Argenta, and I am your final and
most daunting challenge.\f
I dare you to overcome my challenge.\f
HGSS.434.0034:
Argenta: Well!
My goodness, your Pokémon...\r
It’s got star power beyond belief.\f
Even from inside its Poké Ball, I can
feel its charismatic brilliance.\f
But I’m the Hall Matron.
I’ll be the judge of that.\f
I must battle it for myself and see if
that brilliance is genuine.\f
That is why we must battle now.\f
HGSS.434.0035:
Argenta: A good Trainer doesn’t force
their preferred Pokémon on anyone.\f
A good one keeps with their favorite
without drama or fanfare.\f
That is how I see it, at least.\f
And, by the way I see it, you’re an
excellent Trainer!\f
Be sure to visit the Battle Hall again
with a favorite Pokémon.\f
Until then, bye-bye!\f
HGSS.434.0036:
Argenta: You must never forget there
is a place where everyone can shine.\f
That goes for any and every kind of
Pokémon, too.\f
Spread that message in your own words.
It’s one everyone should hear.\f
And now, having lost, this lady has
nothing left to say at all, but...\f
Bye-bye!\f
HGSS.434.0037:
Please select what type of Pokémon
you’d like to battle.
